justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent consistently and accurately interpreted the user's requested dates and times throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent repeatedly reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering concrete alternative slots or proactively broadening the search beyond the exact time requested.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made multiple redundant API calls by checking for the exact same time on the same day after the user had already broadened their request to "any time."
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was frustrating due to the agent's inability to find any available slots and its repetitive apologies and suggestions, leading to a long and unproductive conversation.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent struggled to recover from unavailability, repeatedly checking the exact same timeframes without intelligently expanding its search or offering a wider range of alternatives until much later in the conversation.

overall_notes: The agent's primary failing was its inability to proactively suggest alternative times or days when the user's specific requests were unavailable, instead relying on the user to provide new parameters repeatedly.
